positions.title: Quality Engineer
highlights: Debug, maintain, and improve Swift-based automated tests to reduce manual effort and improve test stability
Investigate test failures through log analysis, issue reproduction, and root cause analysis
Maintain and extend a Python/Streamlit-based internal tool with new features, automating tester workflows and cutting process time by more than 2x
details: Support manual and automated testing for an AI user assistant system, including maintenance of related test tools and workflows
Utilize AI-assisted tools to streamline deliveries and support evaluation of outputs

positions.title: QA Automation Engineer
highlights: Led automation QA efforts for a real-time bicycle racing betting platform, coordinating task allocation and delivery timelines
Designed, developed, and maintained automated test suites using Python, Robot Framework, Selenium, and Appium
Improved CI/CD efficiency by introducing parallel test execution and optimizing pipeline jobs
details: Contributed to migration of the test automation framework from Ranorex to a more reusable and scalable solution, improving migration efficiency
Created and refined test scenarios to improve automation coverage and strengthen key validations for production risk reduction
Supported maintenance of in-house dashboards and collaborated with the SRE team on dashboard migration-related investigation
Built a Jenkins pipeline data generator used by testers to create 1000+ user records a month, cutting manual test-account setup effort

positions.title: Associate Software QA Engineer
highlights: Worked as a bilingual (English/Japanese) test engineer for an OTA website — test design, planning, and execution
Performed backend and frontend testing for system upgrades, regression coverage, and UI feature validation
Delivered ISTQB Foundation training for new QA members to support onboarding
details: Coordinated with developers, product managers, and QA members to support project delivery and test execution planning
Contributed to internal workflow improvements in test design templates, issue analysis, and reporting practice
Helped improve collaboration between manual and automation QA workflows as part of internal quality improvement efforts
